description: CHED-D (high-risk food and feed of non-animal origin, HRFNAO) subset of the 383-trace IPAFFS Playwright corpus, selected by title match on 'ched-d'/'chedd' (case-insensitive). 34 traces selected.

boundary.matchRule: case-insensitive 'ched-d' or 'chedd' across the full Title (spec path + describe + test-name segments)
boundary.note: CHED-D has no longer sibling slug (unlike CHED-P vs CHED-PP), so there is no substring-overlap trap and zero false positives to exclude. No accessibility/ched-d-* traces exist in this corpus.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-notification.spec.ts:11 › CHED-D notification › B2C Importer (Not Agent): Submits Valid CHEDD Notification With Purpose As Non-Internal Market
traces.testName: B2C Importer (Not Agent): Submits Valid CHEDD Notification With Purpose As Non-Internal Market
traces.rationale: B2C notifier creates and submits a valid CHED-D end to end; purpose = non-internal market variant of the full notification journey.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-notification.spec.ts:37 › CHED-D notification › B2C Importer (Not Agent): Submits Valid CHEDD Notification Which Can Be Overriden
traces.testName: B2C Importer (Not Agent): Submits Valid CHEDD Notification Which Can Be Overriden
traces.rationale: Full B2C notifier create-and-submit journey for a valid CHED-D; inspector override is the trailing assertion on the same journey.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-notification.spec.ts:55 › CHED-D notification › B2C Importer (Not Agent): Submits Valid ROW CHEDD Notification and Inspector Cancels
traces.testName: B2C Importer (Not Agent): Submits Valid ROW CHEDD Notification and Inspector Cancels
traces.rationale: Full RoW CHED-D create-and-submit journey end to end; inspector cancel is the trailing outcome.

traces.title: smoke/smoke-ched-d-notifier-inspector-decision-flows.spec.ts:12 › CHED-D notifier flows with inspector decisions › should validate ROW CHED-D after B2C notifier submission
traces.testName: should validate ROW CHED-D after B2C notifier submission
traces.rationale: Richest end-to-end trace (20 pages): B2C notifier creates and submits a RoW CHED-D, inspector validates. Prime source for the full field-gathering journey.

traces.title: smoke/smoke-ched-d-notifier-inspector-decision-flows.spec.ts:44 › CHED-D notifier flows with inspector decisions › should reject ROW CHED-D after B2B notifier submission
traces.testName: should reject ROW CHED-D after B2B notifier submission
traces.rationale: B2B notifier creates and submits a RoW CHED-D end to end; inspector reject is the trailing decision outcome.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-arrival-date.spec.ts:7 › CHED-D Transport Details arrival date validation › should show an error when arrival date is more than 5 days in the past
traces.testName: should show an error when arrival date is more than 5 days in the past
traces.rationale: Exercises the CHED-D transport arrival-date error state (>5 days past) — CHED-D-specific validation copy.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-arrival-date.spec.ts:36 › CHED-D Transport Details arrival date validation › should show an error when arrival date is more than 120 days in the future
traces.testName: should show an error when arrival date is more than 120 days in the future
traces.rationale: Exercises the CHED-D transport arrival-date error state (>120 days future) — CHED-D-specific validation copy and date-window bound.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-cuc.spec.ts:14 › CHED-D Common User Charge › B2C notifier submits CUC CHEDD → notification is NEW and SOAP returns the record
traces.testName: B2C notifier submits CUC CHEDD → notification is NEW and SOAP returns the record
traces.rationale: Common User Charge (billing) variant of the CHED-D submission.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-cuc-replacement-amendment.spec.ts:21 › CHED-D Common User Charge — replace and amend › B2C notifier submits CUC CHEDD → B2B inspector permits, replaces and requests amendment → B2C notifier resubmits amended CHED
traces.testName: B2C notifier submits CUC CHEDD → B2B inspector permits, replaces and requests amendment → B2C notifier resubmits amended CHED
traces.rationale: Common User Charge (billing) variant with a replace-and-amend lifecycle; inspector permit/replace/amendment plus notifier resubmission.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-copy-as-new.spec.ts:15 › CHED-D copy as new flows › should validate copied ROW CHED-D after B2C notifier submission and B2B inspection
traces.testName: should validate copied ROW CHED-D after B2C notifier submission and B2B inspection
traces.rationale: Copy-as-new (clone) variant of a RoW CHED-D, then B2C submit and B2B inspection.

traces.title: document/document-access.spec.ts:48 › Document access › CHEDD: notifier and inspector can view attached documents after permit
traces.testName: CHEDD: notifier and inspector can view attached documents after permit
traces.rationale: Post-permit decision-side flow: inspector permits, then both notifier and inspector view attached documents (cross-cutting document feature, CHED-D parameter).

traces.title: document/document-rejection-access.spec.ts:79 › Document access after rejection › CHEDD: notifier and inspector can view attached documents after rejection
traces.testName: CHEDD: notifier and inspector can view attached documents after rejection
traces.rationale: Post-rejection decision-side flow: inspector rejects, then both parties view attached documents (cross-cutting document feature, CHED-D parameter).

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-inspector.spec.ts:16 › Valid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector uploads a valid JPG attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector uploads a valid JPG attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side document upload (valid JPG) during CHED-D inspection; cross-cutting upload feature, CHED-D parameter.

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-inspector.spec.ts:16 › Valid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector uploads a valid PNG attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector uploads a valid PNG attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side document upload (valid PNG); cross-cutting upload feature parameterised by CHED-D.

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-inspector.spec.ts:16 › Valid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector uploads a valid DOCX attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector uploads a valid DOCX attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side document upload (valid DOCX); cross-cutting upload feature parameterised by CHED-D.

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-inspector.spec.ts:16 › Valid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector uploads a valid PDF attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector uploads a valid PDF attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side document upload (valid PDF); cross-cutting upload feature parameterised by CHED-D.

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-inspector.spec.ts:16 › Valid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector uploads a valid DOC attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector uploads a valid DOC attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side document upload (valid DOC); cross-cutting upload feature parameterised by CHED-D.

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-inspector.spec.ts:16 › Valid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector uploads a valid XLS attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector uploads a valid XLS attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side document upload (valid XLS); cross-cutting upload feature parameterised by CHED-D.

traces.title: document/document-upload-invalid-inspector.spec.ts:21 › Invalid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid ZIP attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid ZIP attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side upload rejection (invalid ZIP) — exercises generic upload error copy on the inspector side; cross-cutting feature, CHED-D parameter.

traces.title: document/document-upload-invalid-inspector.spec.ts:21 › Invalid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid LARGE attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid LARGE attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side upload rejection (oversize file) — exercises generic upload error copy on the inspector side; cross-cutting feature, CHED-D parameter.

traces.title: document/document-upload-invalid-inspector.spec.ts:21 › Invalid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid EMPTY attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid EMPTY attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side upload rejection (empty file) — exercises generic upload error copy on the inspector side; cross-cutting feature, CHED-D parameter.

traces.title: document/document-upload-invalid-inspector.spec.ts:21 › Invalid inspector attachment upload › CHED-D › B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid TXT attachment
traces.testName: B2B inspector cannot upload an invalid TXT attachment
traces.rationale: Inspector/decision-side upload rejection (invalid TXT type) — exercises generic upload error copy on the inspector side; cross-cutting feature, CHED-D parameter.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-manipulation.spec.ts:8 › CHED-D manipulation › should be able to delete notification
traces.testName: should be able to delete notification
traces.rationale: Notifier lifecycle-management op (delete a CHED-D notification); real but minor management action that does not fit core/validation/variant/post-submission.

traces.title: notification/ched-d/ched-d-manipulation.spec.ts:30 › CHED-D manipulation › should be able to Amend notification from hub
traces.testName: should be able to Amend notification from hub
traces.rationale: Notifier lifecycle-management op (amend a CHED-D notification from the hub); real editing behaviour but not a create/validate/decide journey.

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-commercial-invoice.spec.ts:30 › Valid commercial invoice attachment upload › CHED-D › B2C notifier uploads a valid DOC commercial invoice attachment
traces.testName: B2C notifier uploads a valid DOC commercial invoice attachment
traces.rationale: Notifier commercial-invoice upload (valid DOC) — cross-cutting document feature parameterised across CHED types; CHED-D touched only incidentally.

traces.title: document/document-upload-valid-commercial-invoice.spec.ts:30 › Valid commercial invoice attachment upload › CHED-D › B2C notifier uploads a valid PNG commercial invoice attachment
traces.testName: B2C notifier uploads a valid PNG commercial invoice attachment
traces.rationale: Notifier commercial-invoice upload (valid PNG) — cross-cutting document feature; CHED-D incidental.

traces.rationale: Notifier commercial-invoice upload (valid JPG) — cross-cutting document feature; CHED-D incidental.

traces.testName: B2C notifier cannot upload an invalid TXT commercial invoice attachment
traces.rationale: Notifier commercial-invoice upload rejection (invalid TXT) — cross-cutting document feature with generic upload error copy; CHED-D incidental.

traces.testName: B2C notifier cannot upload an invalid LARGE commercial invoice attachment
